announcement.text: Enjoy Up to 50% Off on Your Favorite Products Today

home.hero_subtitle: Shop smarter with a wide selection, easy browsing, secure payments, and fast delivery you can trust.
home.cashback_title: Get 15% Cashback on Your Orders You Make

product.review_placeholder: Share your experience with this product...
product.review_login_required: Please login to write a review.

auth.reset_password_heading: Reset your password without losing access to your orders and saved details.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Request a one-time code, verify your email, and set a fresh password in a secure two-step flow.
auth.reset_password_start_desc: Enter your account email and we will send a one-time password to continue.
auth.reset_password_finish_desc: Enter the OTP sent to your email and choose a new password for your account.
auth.reset_password_footer_note: Protected recovery flow for account security
auth.login_heading: Sign in to manage orders, wishlist, and faster checkout.
auth.login_subtitle: Access your saved items, track recent purchases, and continue shopping without losing your flow.
auth.login_card_subtitle: Use your email and password to continue to your Crown Value Mart account.
auth.register_heading: Join Crown Value Mart and keep every order, wishlist, and address in one place.
auth.register_subtitle: Build your account once and come back to a smoother shopping experience every time.
auth.register_card_subtitle: A few details now will make checkout, tracking, and support much faster later.
auth.register_feature_saved: Keep wishlists and order history synced
auth.register_feature_support: Get faster support with one account
auth.register_panel_copy: Your account keeps orders, saved items, support messages, and delivery details together so shopping stays simple.

order.title: My Orders
order.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
order.meta_description: View and manage your orders at Crown Value Mart.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.order_success_desc: Your order has been placed and is being processed.
checkout.login_required: Please login to proceed with checkout.
checkout.empty_cart: Your cart is empty. Add some items before checkout.

footer.tagline: Your one-stop destination for groceries, essentials, and more at the best prices.

trust.fast_delivery_desc: Get your orders delivered quickly and safely.
trust.best_deals_desc: Enjoy great deals and competitive pricing.

support.title: Customer Support
support.subject: Subject
support.message_placeholder: Describe your issue in detail so the support team can help faster.
support.no_tickets_desc: If you need help, create a new ticket above.
support.select_ticket_desc: Choose a ticket from the list to view the full conversation and send a reply.
support.ticket_closed_reply: This ticket is already resolved or closed, so new replies are disabled.
support.meta_description: Get help and support from Crown Value Mart customer service.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.hero_title: Manage your profile, password, and saved addresses from one place.
profile.hero_subtitle: Keep delivery details current and secure your account without leaving the same shopping flow.
profile.contact_details_hint: Update your name and phone number used for delivery and support.
profile.empty_address_desc: Add your first address to speed up checkout and order tracking.
profile.addresses_hint: Add, edit, delete, and set your default delivery address.
profile.password_card_hint: Open a secure popup to change your current password.
profile.delete_address_description: This action will remove the address from your profile. Please confirm before continuing.
profile.security_hint: Use your current password to save a new one.
profile.email_read_only: Email is read-only for this account.
profile.password_required: Enter your current and new password.
profile.open_orders: Check recent purchases and delivery status.
profile.saved_items: Jump back into products you liked before.
profile.support_center: Reach support and continue existing conversations.
profile.login_required: Please login to view your profile.
profile.meta_description: Manage your Crown Value Mart account profile and addresses.

wishlist.title: My Wishlist
wishlist.meta_description: View and manage your saved items at Crown Value Mart.

track_order.title: Track Your Order
track_order.enter_order_number: Enter your order number to track your order
track_order.meta_description: Track your Crown Value Mart order status and delivery updates.

shop.title: Shop All Products
shop.meta_description: Browse our wide selection of groceries, electronics, household essentials and more at Crown Value Mart.
shop.no_products_desc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you are looking for.

admin_products.title: Product Management
admin_products.meta_description: Manage your storefront products, filter inventory, and remove items from the catalog.
admin_products.subtitle: Review the live catalog, narrow it with category, subcategory, or search filters, and remove products directly from the same dashboard.
admin_products.create_modal_subtitle: Fill the same multipart fields used by the POST /products endpoint, including localized values, attributes JSON, and image uploads.
admin_products.search_placeholder: Search products by name or keyword
admin_products.load_edit_failed: Failed to load product details for editing.
admin_products.confirm_delete: Delete this product from the catalog?
admin_products.confirm_delete_description: You are about to remove "{title}" from the catalog. This action cannot be undone.
admin_products.confirm_delete_warning: Deleting a product removes it from the storefront and admin listing immediately.
admin_products.edit_modal_subtitle: Load the current product payload, update any fields, manage existing images, and optionally upload new ones before sending PUT /products/:id.
admin_products.field_attributes_hint: Use the exact localized JSON structure: { "en": {...}, "ar": {...} }.
admin_products.field_images_cta: Select one or more product images
admin_products.field_images_hint: These files will be sent as repeated images fields in multipart form-data.
admin_products.field_locked_on_edit: Barcode, item code, and SKU stay read-only in edit mode to match the current update API.
admin_products.attributes_invalid: Attributes must be valid JSON with both en and ar objects.
admin_products.images_required: Select at least one image before submitting.
admin_products.empty_title: No products matched the current filters
admin_products.empty_description: Try a different search term or reset the category filters to see more products.
admin_products.login_required: You need to sign in with an admin account to access product management.
admin_products.admin_only: This page is restricted to admin users.

admin_orders.title: Order Management
admin_orders.meta_description: Review every order, confirm pending purchases, ship confirmed orders, and verify delivery from one admin dashboard.
admin_orders.subtitle: Manage every order from pending through delivered with action confirmation and delivery OTP verification.
admin_orders.empty_description: No orders are available for the current page.
admin_orders.load_failed: Unable to load admin orders right now.
admin_orders.action_confirm_description: This will move the order status to CONFIRMED.
admin_orders.action_cancel_description: This will move the order status to CANCELLED.
admin_orders.action_ship_description: This will move the order status to SHIPPED.
admin_orders.action_verify_description: Enter the delivery OTP to complete this order and move it to DELIVERED.
admin_orders.action_failed: Unable to complete this action. Please try again.
admin_orders.admin_login_required: You need to sign in with an admin account to access order management.
admin_orders.admin_only: This page is restricted to admin users.

admin_product_import.title: Import Products
admin_product_import.meta_description: Upload a JSON file, validate product data, and bulk create products in the admin catalog.
admin_product_import.subtitle: Upload an Excel file, validate each row, transform it into the bulk-create payload, and send the final list to the bulk create endpoint.
admin_product_import.upload_subtitle: Use the first worksheet from an Excel file.
admin_product_import.upload_cta: Choose an Excel file to import
admin_product_import.upload_hint: The sheet should include the product columns used by the backend seed and bulk-create flows.
admin_product_import.no_valid_data: Upload and validate a JSON file before importing.
admin_product_import.preview_subtitle: Review the parsed products before sending them to bulk create.
admin_product_import.sample_subtitle: Download the sample `.xls` file, update the rows with your product data, then upload the edited file here.
admin_product_import.step_one_text: Download the sample workbook with the required product columns.
admin_product_import.step_two_text: Update the rows in Excel with your own product values and save the file.
admin_product_import.step_three_text: Upload the edited file here, validate it, and import the products.
admin_product_import.login_required: You need to sign in with an admin account to import product data.
admin_product_import.admin_only: This page is restricted to admin users.

category.title: {category} - Shop by Category
category.meta_description: Shop the best {category} products at Crown Value Mart. Great prices and fast delivery.
category.no_products_desc: Check back later for new arrivals in this category.

deals.title: Deals & Offers
deals.meta_description: Discover the best deals and featured products at Crown Value Mart. Save big on groceries, electronics and more.
deals.no_deals_desc: Check back soon for exciting offers and discounts.
